command:
python -c 
import urllib.request

# Try various PMC PDF URL patterns including the domain-specific ones
urls = [
    # Standard PMC PDF download endpoint
    'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2669973/pdf/',
    # Direct filename from XML self-uri
    'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/instance/2669973/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf',
    # Alternative PMC format
    'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/instance/2669973/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf',
    # BioC structured format
    'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/research/bionlp/RESTful/pmcoa.cgi/BioC_xml/PMC2669973/unicode',
]

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,application/xml,*/*',
}

for url in urls:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:
            data = resp.read(100)
            ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            print(f'OK {resp.status} {ct[:50]} | {data[:40]} | {url}')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'ERR {str(e)[:60]} | {url}')
